response.global_summary: The video begins with an introductory conversation between two VTubers. Following the introduction, Amane Kanata performs the song "波に名前をつけること。僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。" (Nami ni Namae wo Tsukeru Koto. Bokura no Kokkyuu ni Owari ga Aru Koto.), composed by Tatsuya Kitani. The performance continues until the end of the video.

scenes.description: Two VTubers are on stage having an introductory conversation. No vocal music is playing.
Amane Kanata performs the song "波に名前をつけること。僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。" on stage. On-screen text attributes the song to Tatsuya Kitani.
scenes.song_title: 波に名前をつけること。僕らの呼吸に終わりがあること。
